property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: implicitWait_findsLateElements

error.message: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-OAUDNGK', ip: '192.168.1.14' Build info: version: '4.23.1', revision: '656257d8e9' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--headless=new, --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage], extensions: []}}]}] Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--headless=new, --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage], extensions: []}}

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure.
